title: Poached Flaky Romano Pepper Stir-fry
description: A savory Japanese dish featuring flaky romano pepper poached in a light sauce, perfect for weeknight meals.
instructions: Wash and slice the romano peppers thinly.
In a small bowl, mix soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, salt, and chili garlic paste if using.
Add sliced romano peppers to the marinade mixture and marinate for at least 30 minutes or overnight in the fridge.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Place marinated peppers in the pan and poach them until tender, about 15-20 minutes.
Gently stir-fry any desired vegetables (like scallions, ginger) with poached romano peppers for another minute to combine flavors.
